    def test_delete_user(self):
    
        chrome_options = Options()
        chrome_options.add_argument("--disable-notifications")
    
        driver = webdriver.Chrome(options=chrome_options)
        wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 30)
    
        try:
            # 1. Open browser
            driver.maximize_window()
    
            # 2. Navigate to URL
            driver.get("https://newsite-qa.matter.in/")
    
            # 3. Wait for Matter logo
            matter_logo = wait.until(
                EC.visibility_of_element_located(
                    (By.XPATH, "//img[@alt='Matter Black Logo']")
                )
            )
            assert matter_logo.is_displayed(), "Matter logo not displayed"
    
            # 4. Click Login
            driver.find_element(By.LINK_TEXT, "Login").click()
    
            # 5. Enter phone number
            phone_field = wait.until(
                EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.NAME, "phone"))
            )
    
            phone_number = "9145496704"
            phone_field.send_keys(phone_number)
    
            driver.find_element(By.XPATH, "//button[@type='submit']").click()
    
            # ---------------------------------------------------
            # STEP 1: SEND OTP API
            # ---------------------------------------------------
    
            send_otp_url = "https://orbitqa.matter.in/matter-auth/v1/auth/login"
    
            headers = {
                "Content-Type": "application/json",
                "x-api": "552721c7ca971a196e73"
            }
    
            send_payload = {
                "phone": phone_number
            }
    
            send_response = requests.post(
                send_otp_url,
                json=send_payload,
                headers=headers
            )
    
            print("Send OTP Status:", send_response.status_code)
            print("Send OTP Raw Response:", send_response.text)
